message:
chore(artifacts): update verification evidence, migration cohort logs, and issue metadata

Update 55 verification evidence and summary files across sections 10_12
and 10_13, reflecting latest test run results and validation cycles.
Update migration cohort validation log and summary with current
cohort status. Update beads issue metadata with progress tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
